title: In Syria, Kidnappings of Women and Girls Fuel a Minority Group’s Fears
summary_full: A Times investigation found that abductions of women and girls from Syria’s Alawite minority were more common, and more brutal, than the government has acknowledged.
summary_public: A Times investigation found that abductions of women and girls from Syria’s Alawite minority were more common, and more brutal, than the government has acknowledged.
